source_references: Zákon č. 48/1997 Sb., o veřejném zdravotním pojištění (Public Health Insurance Act)
Zákon č. 526/1990 Sb., o cenách (Pricing Act)
interpretation_text: cenaPuvodce is the maximum manufacturer price (cena původce) in CZK, excluding VAT, as regulated by SÚKL under the Pricing Act and Public Health Insurance Act. It is the ex-factory price ceiling set by administrative decision. Maps to comparison_category=manufacturer_price. Comparable to PL Cena zbytu netto (both are manufacturer ex-VAT prices).
caveats: Czech pharmaceutical VAT is 12% (reduced rate since 2024-01-01, previously 10%). cenaPuvodce excludes VAT.
cenaPuvodce is the regulated maximum; actual transaction prices may be lower due to discounts.
Currency is CZK (Czech koruna). Cross-country comparison requires EUR/CZK FX conversion via ECB reference rate.
Some products have dohodnutaNejvyssiCena (negotiated maximum price) which may differ from cenaPuvodce.

notes: Czech pharmaceutical VAT is 12% (reduced rate since 2024-01-01, previously 10%). cenaPuvodce excludes VAT.
cenaPuvodce is the regulated maximum; actual transaction prices may be lower due to discounts.
Currency is CZK (Czech koruna). Cross-country comparison requires EUR/CZK FX conversion via ECB reference rate.
Some products have dohodnutaNejvyssiCena (negotiated maximum price) which may differ from cenaPuvodce.

source_references: Zákon č. 48/1997 Sb., o veřejném zdravotním pojištění
interpretation_text: maxCenaLekarna is the maximum pharmacy price in CZK, including wholesale margin, pharmacy margin, and VAT (12%). It is the ceiling price at which pharmacies may dispense to patients. Maps to comparison_category=pharmacy_purchase_price. Comparable to IE Reimbursement Price (both represent the price at pharmacy level), though CZ includes VAT while IE is ex-VAT.
caveats: Includes VAT (12%) — when comparing with IE Reimbursement Price (ex-VAT), strip VAT via derivation rule: maxCenaLekarna_exVAT = maxCenaLekarna / 1.12.
Includes both wholesale and pharmacy margins, while IE Reimbursement Price includes only wholesale margin. This creates a structural ~5-10% upward bias in CZ prices relative to IE.
Currency is CZK. Cross-country comparison requires EUR/CZK FX conversion.

notes: Includes VAT (12%) — when comparing with IE Reimbursement Price (ex-VAT), strip VAT via derivation rule: maxCenaLekarna_exVAT = maxCenaLekarna / 1.12.
Includes both wholesale and pharmacy margins, while IE Reimbursement Price includes only wholesale margin. This creates a structural ~5-10% upward bias in CZ prices relative to IE.
Currency is CZK. Cross-country comparison requires EUR/CZK FX conversion.
